text:
Bachaem (バチャエム, Bachaemu) is a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Fugetsu. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Appearance

Bachaem has fair hair parted at the center and shorter, darker hair at the sides of his head. He has a crooked nose and noticeably small eyes. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Personality

Bachaem expresses genuine concern for Fugetsu's safety. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Bachaem and Ryoji stand guard in Prince Fugetsu's room, realizing they're the only ones that truly want to protect the prince and surmising it may be better if they ask to be put on two different shifts.
